title: S&P 500 falls 0.49% to 7,138.80; Nasdaq -0.90%; OpenAI weakness + oil surge
snippet: S&P 500 fell 0.49% to 7,138.80, snapping a record streak. Nasdaq Composite dropped 0.90% to 24,663.80. Dow slipped 0.05% to 49,141.93. Tech stocks slid on WSJ report that OpenAI revenue and new user growth below targets; CFO Friar concerned about computing contract affordability. Oil surge ($111 Brent) added pressure. Coca-Cola +4% on earnings partially offset losses.
tag_reason: 시장 반전(전일 사상 최고→하락)은 신규 사건.
